category_sources: Official GNUstep Base reference says it implements the OpenStep Foundation Kit API.
source_facts.description says it is a library of general-purpose non-graphical Objective-C objects.
display_name_sources: Official GNUstep documentation uses GNUstep Base as the title.
source_facts.name identifies the package as gnustep-base.
docs_sources: Official GNUstep Base API reference and system documentation are dedicated project documentation pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/gnustep/libs-base; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GNUstep Base documentation describes OpenStep Foundation Kit compatibility and Base library APIs.
source_facts.description identifies an Objective-C object library.
